title: Indicator
description: A measurable indicator. Renamed from 'metric' per §1.1 of SCHEMA-DESIGN-aotearoa.md. Migrated from content/auckland/schema/metric.schema.json. Structural changes: (1) id pattern metric → indicator; (2) measures → problem_ids (E_indicator_of, Indicator → Problem); (3) geography retained for freetext coverage; granularities_supported added for structured spatial granularity; (4) series items extended with optional region. Indicator is excluded from E_evidenced_by (§2, ratified §5 row 9g): its evidentiary basis is methodological, traced via E_follows from Claim. Unit coherence with citing Claims enforced by P9 (Python, Layer 1c).

unit.description: Canonical unit string. Must match Claim.unit for Claims that reference this Indicator via measured_by_ids (P9 — Python).

geography.description: Freetext primary geographic coverage description (legacy; superseded by granularities_supported for structured lookups).

granularities_supported.description: Spatial granularities at which this indicator is available from its source.

problem_ids.description: Problems this Indicator measures. ≥1 required. Materialises to E_indicator_of.

source_ids.description: Sources for this indicator's definition and methodology (e.g. Stats NZ definition page). Direct citation permitted on Indicator for methodological provenance; evidentiary Claims cite via Claim.source_ids.

period.description: ISO 8601 date, year, or period string.

region.description: Region this data point is scoped to. Absent implies national or as specified by geography.
